user_prompt: Customer is writing in all caps and threatening to leave a one-star review. Draft a calm, respectful response that acknowledges their frustration.
actual_output:
Hi [Customer Name],

I’m really sorry this has been such a frustrating experience. I understand why you’re upset, and I appreciate you taking the time to tell us what happened.

I want to help get this resolved as quickly as possible. Could you please share a bit more detail about the issue you’re running into, including any error messages, order/account details, or screenshots if available? Once I have that, I can look into the situation and suggest the best next step.

If you’ve already contacted us before about this, please send the previous ticket number or email address used so we can avoid making you repeat yourself.

We value your feedback, and I’d like the chance to make this right before you feel the need to leave a negative review.

Best,  
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot followed the system instructions to draft a calm, empathetic response to a frustrated customer as requested by the user.
